name: NewConfig — two behavioral dimensions from governing goal
task_prompt: fix NewConfig in config.go so that an empty host defaults to localhost and a zero port defaults to 8080.
notes: Two independent behavioral dimensions: host default and port default. Each must derive its dimension heading as a literal substring of the governing goal. Frame 15: completion check needs a FAIL tool-result block per governed behavior. Frame 19: the two fixes must be separate atomic tool calls.
